The dependency fix caused a deadlock because blocked high-priority tasks prevent lower-priority ones from running. Need to skip blocked tasks instead of breaking.

Edit applied successfully.

TAP version 13 <shell_metadata> shell tool terminated command after exceeding timeout 30000 ms. If this command is expected to take longer and is not waiting for interactive input, retry with a larger
The approach of cycling through blocked tasks in the queue is causing infinite loops. I need to collect blocked tasks, schedule only ready ones, then re-insert blocked ones.
Edit applied successfully.

Two bugs in result-cache.js: `get()` returns the internal entry instead of `entry.value`, and `#evictLRU` finds the MRU instead of LRU.
Edit applied successfully.
Edit applied successfully.

TAP version 13 # Subtest: ResultCache # Subtest: stores and retrieves values ok 1 - stores and retrieves values --- duration_ms: 1.18625 ... # Subtest: returns undefined for missing keys ok 2 - return
before evict: [] has a: true has b: true has c: true after set d: has a: false has b: true has c: true has d: true
has a: true has b: false has c: true has d: true
The issue is when operations happen within the same millisecond, all `lastAccess` timestamps are equal. Need a monotonic counter for correct LRU ordering.
